name: Shrimp & Pork Wontons
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok. Add pork and cook until browned. Remove pork and all but 2 tablespoons of oil.
2. Stir fry vegetables and shrimp. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch and soy sauce. Add the pork, cornstarch mixture to the shrimp mixture.
3. Place a spoonful of filling in the center of wonton skin. Seal edges with water and fold. Deep fry in oil until golden. Serve with Sweet & Sour Sauce.
